```{r}
library(vegan)

#importing and calculating crop diversity
df_culture <- read.csv("cultures.csv")


df_culture <- aggregate(Abondance ~ Parcelle + Especes.presentes, data = df_culture, FUN = sum)

crop_matrix <- reshape(df_culture, 
                        idvar = "Parcelle", 
                        timevar = "Especes.presentes", 
                        v.names = "Abondance",
                        direction = "wide")

crop_matrix[is.na(crop_matrix)] <- 0

crop_diversity  <- data.frame(Parcelle = crop_matrix$Parcelle,
                            Shannon_index_crop = diversity(crop_matrix[, -1], index = "shannon"))

write.csv(crop_diversity, "crop_diversity.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```




```{r}
# calculating nematode diversity
df_nematodes <- read.csv("nematodes_cleaned.csv")


nematode_matrix <- reshape(df_nematodes[, c("Parcelle", "species", "Proportion" )], 
                        idvar = "Parcelle",
                        timevar = "species", 
                        v.names = "Proportion",
                        direction = "wide")
nematode_matrix[is.na(nematode_matrix)] <- 0
nematode_diversity <- data.frame(Parcelle = nematode_matrix$Parcelle,
                                  Shannon_index_nematodes = diversity(nematode_matrix[, -1], index = "shannon"))
write.csv(nematode_diversity, "nematode_diversity.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r}
print('---------------------------------------------')
# calculating trophic diversity
df_trophic <- read.csv("nematodes_cleaned.csv")

df_trophic <- aggregate(Proportion ~ Parcelle + trophic.group, data = df_trophic, FUN = sum)

trophic_matrix <- reshape(df_trophic[, c("Parcelle", "trophic.group", "Proportion")], 
                        idvar = "Parcelle",
                        timevar = "trophic.group", 
                        v.names = "Proportion",
                        direction = "wide")
trophic_matrix[is.na(trophic_matrix)] <- 0

colnames(trophic_matrix) <- c("Parcelle", 
                                "Phytoparasite", 
                                "Predator", 
                                "Unknown")

write.csv(trophic_matrix, "trophic_diversity.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
df_egg <- read.csv("oeufs_nematodes.csv")


# combining all diversity indices
df_combined <- merge(crop_diversity, nematode_diversity, by = "Parcelle", all = TRUE)
df_combined <- merge(df_combined, trophic_matrix, by = "Parcelle", all = TRUE)
df_combined <- merge(df_combined, df_egg, by = "Parcelle", all = TRUE)
df_combined <- df_combined[order(df_combined$Parcelle), ]

write.csv(df_combined, "combined_diversity.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}

library(betareg)
df_combined_beta <- df_combined

df_combined_beta$Phytoparasite  <- ((df_combined_beta$Phytoparasite/100) * (nrow(df_combined_beta) - 1) + 0.5) / nrow(df_combined_beta)

df_combined_beta$Predator <- ((df_combined_beta$Predator/100) * (nrow(df_combined_beta) - 1) + 0.5) / nrow(df_combined_beta)
df_combined_beta$Unknown <- ((df_combined_beta$Unknown/100) * (nrow(df_combined_beta) - 1) + 0.5) / nrow(df_combined_beta)

model_phyto <- betareg(Phytoparasite ~ Shannon_index_crop  + Œufs, data = df_combined_beta)
model_pred <- betareg(Predator ~ Shannon_index_crop  + Œufs, data = df_combined_beta)
model_unknown <- betareg(Unknown ~ Shannon_index_crop  + Œufs, data = df_combined_beta)
summary(model_phyto)
summary(model_pred)
summary(model_unknown)






```

```{r}
#check the rows droppped by the model

nrow(model_phyto$model) 
summary(df_combined$Phytoparasite)

nrow(model_pred$model)
summary(df_combined$Predator)

nrow(model_unknown$model)
summary(df_combined$Unknown)

```

```{r}
# save summary results in rsds
write.csv(summary(model_phyto)$coefficients, "model_phyto_summary_beta.csv")
write.csv(summary(model_pred)$coefficients, "model_pred_summary_beta.csv")
write.csv(summary(model_unknown)$coefficients, "model_unknown_summary_beta.csv")



```


```{r}
# binomial glm for trophic diversity
df_combined_glm <- df_combined
df_combined_glm$Phytoparasite <- round(df_combined_glm$Phytoparasite)
df_combined_glm$Predator <- round(df_combined_glm$Predator)
df_combined_glm$Unknown <- round(df_combined_glm$Unknown)


#binomial glm

model_phyto_glm <- glm(cbind(Phytoparasite, 100 - Phytoparasite) ~ Shannon_index_crop  + Œufs, family = "binomial", data = df_combined_glm)
model_pred_glm <- glm(cbind(Predator, 100 - Predator) ~ Shannon_index_crop  + Œufs, family = "binomial", data = df_combined_glm)
model_unknown_glm <- glm(cbind(Unknown, 100 - Unknown) ~ Shannon_index_crop  + Œufs, family = "binomial", data = df_combined_glm)
#summary of the models
summary(model_phyto_glm)
print("-------------------")
summary(model_pred_glm)
print("-------------------")
summary(model_unknown_glm)


```

```{r}
# save summary results in csv
write.csv(summary(model_phyto_glm)$coefficients, "model_phyto_summary_glm.csv")
write.csv(summary(model_pred_glm)$coefficients, "model_pred_summary_glm.csv")
write.csv(summary(model_unknown_glm)$coefficients, "model_unknown_summary_glm.csv")


```

```{r}
# linear model for nematode diversity
model_nematode <- lm(Shannon_index_nematodes ~ Shannon_index_crop + Œufs, data = df_combined)
summary(model_nematode)


```

```{r}
# save summary results in csv
write.csv(summary(model_nematode)$coefficients, "model_nematode_lm.csv")
```



```{r}
# Load required packages
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(factoextra)
library(phangorn)
library(ggtree)
library(phangorn)



# PCA for the data

# read the combined data

df_combined_pca <- read.csv("combined_diversity.csv")

# convert all col to numeric
df_combined_pca[, -1] <- lapply(df_combined_pca[, -1], as.numeric)

#remove NA rows
df_combined_pca <- na.omit(df_combined_pca)


df_combined_pca$trophic_factor <- apply(df_combined_pca[, c("Phytoparasite", "Predator", "Unknown")], 1, function(x) {
  c("Phytoparasite", "Predator", "Unknown")[which.max(x)]
})

```


```{r}

# Perform PCA removing 1st and last column (Parcelle and trophic_factor)
pca_result <- prcomp(df_combined_pca[, -c(1, ncol(df_combined_pca))], 
                    center = TRUE, 
                    scale. = TRUE)



png("pca_plot.png", width = 3000, height = 4000, res = 300)                   
# Visualize PCA results
fviz_pca_ind(pca_result, 
             geom.ind = "point", 
             col.ind = df_combined_pca$trophic_factor, 
             palette = c("red", "blue", "green"), 
             addEllipses = TRUE, 
             legend.title = "Trophic Factor") +
  labs(title = "PCA of Nematode Diversity Data") +
  theme_minimal()
dev.off()




pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x)
# Add Parcelle and trophic_factor to PCA scores
pca_scores$Parcelle <- df_combined_pca$Parcelle
pca_scores$trophic_factor <- df_combined_pca$trophic_factor
write.csv(pca_scores, "pca_scores.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}



# Scale the numeric data
matTrans <- scale(df_combined_pca[, -c(1, ncol(df_combined_pca))])

# Compute Euclidean distance matrix
d <- dist(matTrans, method = "euclidean")

# Perform hierarchical clustering using UPGMA method
tupgma <- upgma(d)

# Prepare class data (must be a data.frame with 'label' column matching tree tip labels)
class_data <- data.frame(
  label = df_combined_pca[, 1],
  class = df_combined_pca$trophic_factor
)

class_data$class <- factor(class_data$class, levels = c("Phytoparasite", "Predator"))

png("dendrogram_plot.png", width = 4000, height = 3000, res = 300)

# Create circular dendrogram with class-based tip coloring and legend
t4 <- ggtree(tupgma, layout = "circular", size = 1) %<+% class_data +
  geom_text(aes(color = class, label = label, angle = angle,
                hjust = -0.2), 
            size = 5,  # Increase size for larger text
            fontface = "bold",  # Ensure bold font
            show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_tippoint(aes(color = class), alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  labs(title = "Circular Dendrogram",
       color = "Trophic Factor") + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        legend.position = "right")

# Show the plot
print(t4)

dev.off()






# Save the clustering result
# hc_clusters <- cutree(hc_result, k = 3)  # Cut the dendrogram into 3 clusters
# df_combined_pca$hc_cluster <- hc_clusters
# write.csv(df_combined_pca, "hc_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
